name: chemtradeasia-mdm-seller
title: MDM Seller
description: Seller-facing MDM features: manage your own SDS / TDS / MSDS documents, with room for future MDM seller tools.

mdmApiEndpoint.title: MDM API Endpoint
mdmApiEndpoint.description: Base URL of the MDM API (e.g. https://tradeasia.exchange/api/v1)

mdmUsername.title: MDM Username
mdmUsername.description: TEMPORARY (dev only): admin login. Replace with a seller-scoped MDM token before production rollout — sellers can read these settings on their own account.

stripeSecretKey.title: Stripe Secret Key
stripeSecretKey.description: Server-side Stripe API secret key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...), used to create Checkout Sessions.

stripePublishableKey.title: Stripe Publishable Key
stripePublishableKey.description: Client-side Stripe key (pk_test_... or pk_live_...), used only by the embedded Subscription (Embed) page to mount Stripe's Payment Element. Not needed for the redirect-based Subscription page.

stripeWebhookSecret.title: Stripe Webhook Signing Secret
stripeWebhookSecret.description: Signing secret (whsec_...) for the Stripe webhook endpoint pointed at /_v/mdm-seller/subscription/webhook. Used to verify incoming events.

stripeMonthlyAmountUsd.title: Monthly Plan Price (USD)
stripeMonthlyAmountUsd.description: Amount charged per month for the Monthly subscription plan. Defaults to 25 if not set.

stripeYearlyAmountUsd.title: Yearly Plan Price (USD)
stripeYearlyAmountUsd.description: Amount charged per year for the Yearly subscription plan. Defaults to 250 if not set.
